texto: We have developed communications systems to permit man on earth to talk with man on the moon. Yet mother often cannot talk with daughter, father to son, black to white, labour with management or democracy with communism
explicacao: Orientação direta de Hadley Read sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “We have developed communications systems to permit man on earth to talk with man on the moon. Yet…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, communication, reflexao, útil em momentos de reflexao.
